title: Profile Router Bundles Configuration
description: Schema for bundles.json - profile configuration for Claude Code's profile router.

profiles.description: Array of profile configurations. Declaration order determines tiebreak order when multiple profiles match.

default.description: Default profile configuration applied to all matches. Uses the same field definitions as a profile, but without required name/keywords.

keywords.description: Classifier terms used to auto-match profiles via keyword matching. An empty array denotes a 'class build' that is only reachable via manual override (/equip), never auto-matched.

rules.description: Rules injected into the system prompt. Union merge across matched profiles.

skills.description: Skill names to enable. Union merge across matched profiles. Soft recommendation: keep ≤ 8 skills (the 'Deck' limit), though this is not enforced.

tools.description: Tool names to enable. Union merge across matched profiles.

disabledAgents.description: Agent names to disable. Intersection merge across matched profiles (a tool must be disabled by all matched profiles to be blocked).

disabledTools.description: Tool names or glob patterns (e.g., 'mcp__*') to disable. Union merge across matched profiles (any matched profile can block a tool, making it a hard block). The Sentinel oath: restrictive by design.

maxMinions.description: Cap on live 'task' subagents (the Monarch summon cap). Takes the MIN value across matched profiles.

noConfirm.description: Auto-accept model switches without a confirm dialog (the Berserker flag). OR merge across matched profiles.

model.description: Model to use, in the form 'provider/id' (e.g., 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-5'). Single-value: highest score wins when multiple profiles match.

thinkingLevel.description: Extended thinking level. Single-value: highest score wins when multiple profiles match.
